videos.headline: BYU scores game-winning touchdown in 2nd OT
videos.description: BYU's Ty'Son Williams runs into the end zone for a 5-yard touchdown in second overtime, giving BYU a 29-26 win over Tennessee in comeback fashion.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BYU scores game-winning touchdown in 2nd OT) 2019/09/07

videos.headline: Jennings bobbles ball, recovers it for TD
videos.description: Jarrett Guarantano finds Jauan Jennings who bobbles the ball and it is nearly intercepted, but Jennings redirects the ball and recovers it for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jennings bobbles ball, recovers it for TD) 2019/09/07

videos.headline: 64-yard pass sets up game-tying field goal
videos.description: Zach Wilson goes deep for a 64-yard completion to Micah Simon, setting up BYU for a game-tying field goal to send the game to overtime.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (64-yard pass sets up game-tying field goal) 2019/09/07

videos.headline: BYU head coach busts a move after win
videos.description: BYU head coach Kalani Sitake celebrates with some dance moves after the Cougars' win against Tennessee.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Misc. (BYU head coach busts a move after win ) 2019/09/08
